stories.title: PGA Championship Round 1 Recap — Scheffler Leads Seven-Way Jam at Aronimink

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Seven players share the Round 1 lead at the PGA Championship.

Scheffler. Potgieter. Hisatsune. Min Woo Lee. Jaeger. All tied at 3-under after Thursday.

Aronimink is playing TOUGH. Round 2 begins now. #PGAChampionship #Golf

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The cut line at Aronimink is going to be brutal.

Seven co-leaders at -3. 30+ players within 3 shots of the lead.

Aronimink: firm greens, tight pins, gusty wind. This major championship is wide open. #PGAChampionship

article.headline: PGA Championship Round 1: Scheffler Shares Lead With Six Others as Aronimink Bites Back

stories.title: McIlroy's Grand Slam Bid Wobbles — +4 After Round 1 at Aronimink

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy shot 74 (+4) in Round 1 at Aronimink.

Five bogeys in his final six holes. Foot discomfort. Driver struggles.

The 2026 Grand Slam bid is on life support. He needs a stunning Round 2 to even make the cut. #RoryMcIlroy #PGAChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
McIlroy won the Masters. He could've been halfway to the Grand Slam.

Instead: +4 after Round 1 at Aronimink. He needs one of the great comebacks in major history just to make the cut.

Golf is cruel. #PGAChampionship #RoryMcIlroy

article.headline: McIlroy's Grand Slam Bid Is on Life Support After a +4 First Round at Aronimink

stories.title: Lucas Herbert Wins LIV Virginia Wire-to-Wire — The Flu Couldn't Stop Him

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Lucas Herbert just won LIV Golf Virginia while fighting the flu all week.

Wire-to-wire. 24-under. 4-shot win over Sergio Garcia. $4M prize.

And Anthony Kim shot a 62 on Sunday to win the team event for 4Aces GC. #LIVGolf

article.headline: Lucas Herbert's Flu-Fueled Wire-to-Wire Win Is the LIV Golf Story of the Season

stories.title: Queen City Classic Round 1 — Korda Three Back as HOF Countdown Ticks

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda has 23 of the 27 LPGA Hall of Fame points she needs.

She's 3 shots back after Round 1 at the Queen City Championship in Cincinnati.

4 more points to history. The HOF countdown is real. #LPGA #NellyKorda

article.headline: Korda Three Back at Queen City as Hall of Fame Countdown Reaches the Home Stretch

stories.title: Scheffler's PGA Defense Begins — Defending Champion in Prime Position

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Defending champion Scottie Scheffler is RIGHT where he wants to be.

67 in Round 1. Tied for the lead. First time he's led a major after Round 1.

Aronimink suits him. The weekend could belong to the world No. 1. #PGAChampionship #ScottieScheffler

article.headline: Scottie Scheffler Is Defending His PGA Championship — and He's in the Perfect Position to Do It
